title: 5 Day Faculty Development Programme on Innovative Research on Millets for Food and Nutritional Security to commemorate International Year of Millets
content: Faculty development programme was organized with the theme ‘Innovative Research on Millets for Food and Nutritional Security’ from 26th of April 2023 to 30th April 2023. The Programme started with a brief introduction of different nutritional aspects of millets and developing new varieties of millets for resistance to stress, insect pest and diseases, agronomic practices, crop rotation, processing, value addition, product development and marketing. Key Points
